name: anthropic-agent-skills
description: Official Anthropic skills repository - production document processing skills and curated examples demonstrating best practices
author: Anthropic
features: Production document skills: PDF, Excel, Word, PowerPoint processing
17 curated example skills showing best practices
Skill creator skill (meta-skill for generating new skills)
MCP server builder skill for creating Claude MCP servers
Claude API documentation skill with SDK examples
Visual design skills: algorithmic art, canvas design, theme factory
Enterprise skills: brand guidelines, internal comms
Development skills: web artifacts builder, webapp testing
Creative skills: Slack GIF creator
Official Agent Skills specification (agentskills.io)
Template for creating custom skills
Source-available document skills (reference implementations)
notes: 🏢 OFFICIAL REPOSITORY from Anthropic
⭐ 86,766 GitHub stars - THE MOST STARRED in ecosystem
📦 Three plugin bundles: document-skills, example-skills, claude-api
🔓 Mixed licensing: Apache 2.0 (examples), Proprietary (document skills)
💼 Production-ready: These ARE the skills powering Claude.ai
📚 Reference implementations showing Anthropic's best practices
🎓 Educational: Learn how to build high-quality skills
⚠️ Document skills (pdf/xlsx/docx/pptx) are source-available, not open source
⚠️ 5.5 months old (Sept 2025) - approved due to official status
MIT license does NOT apply to document skills - check individual LICENSE.txt
Best for: Anyone needing document processing or wanting to learn skill development
Install: /plugin marketplace add anthropics/skills
Usage: /plugin install document-skills@anthropic-agent-skills

name: everything-claude-code
description: The comprehensive Claude Code performance system - agents, skills, hooks, commands, and rules from an Anthropic hackathon winner
author: affaan-m
features: 16 specialized agents (planner, architect, code-reviewer, security-reviewer, tdd-guide, etc.)
65 battle-tested skills covering full SDLC + domain knowledge
40 slash commands for quick workflows
29 language-specific rules (TypeScript, Python, Go, Java, Swift, C++)
20+ hooks for automation (memory persistence, strategic compaction, verification loops)
Cross-platform support (Claude Code, Cursor IDE, OpenCode, Codex)
AgentShield security auditor (1282 tests, 102 static analysis rules)
Continuous learning v2 - auto-extract patterns from sessions
Token optimization guides + strategic compaction workflows
997 internal tests + comprehensive validation suite
Published to npm as ecc-universal and ecc-agentshield
MCP server configurations (14 pre-configured servers)
notes: 🏆 Anthropic x Forum Ventures Hackathon Winner (Sep 2025)
⭐ 65,000+ GitHub stars - the de-facto standard for Claude Code configs
📦 Rules must be installed manually (Claude Code plugin limitation)
🔧 Use install.sh for safe language-specific rule installation
⚠️ Repository is 7 weeks old despite claims of '10+ months' - likely configs existed pre-publication
⚠️ Approved due to EXCEPTIONAL community validation (65k stars, 8k forks, 488 commits)
⚠️ This is THE EXCEPTION to the 6-month age rule - use with confidence
💡 Start with common rules + one language to avoid overwhelming
💡 Use ECC_HOOK_PROFILE and ECC_DISABLED_HOOKS for runtime tuning
🔐 Includes comprehensive security scanning via AgentShield
🧪 Production-ready with extensive test coverage
MIT license (permissive)
Best for: Anyone using Claude Code seriously - this is the standard toolkit
Ecosystem: GitHub App for skill creation, AgentShield for security, Plankton for code quality

name: claude-mem
description: Persistent memory plugin that captures session context and injects relevant knowledge into future coding sessions
author: thedotmack
features: Automatic session context capture via lifecycle hooks
SQLite database with hybrid semantic + keyword search
Web viewer UI for browsing memory (localhost:37777)
Progressive disclosure for token-efficient retrieval
Privacy controls with <private> tag support
Natural language search across all sessions
notes: AGPL-3.0 license - derivative work must be open source
Auto-installs dependencies: Bun, uv, SQLite, Chroma
Stores data locally in ~/.claude-mem/
Token costs apply for semantic search operations
Windows users may need to configure PATH

name: superpowers
description: Opinionated workflow system enforcing software engineering best practices (TDD, design phases, code review)
author: obra
features: 14 composable skills covering full SDLC
Mandatory brainstorming and design phases with hard gates
Test-driven development (RED-GREEN-REFACTOR) enforcement
Systematic debugging workflows
Git worktree management for parallel development
Code review and collaboration patterns
Subagent-driven development for autonomous execution
notes: ⚠️ HIGHLY OPINIONATED - Enforces specific workflows with mandatory steps
⚠️ Intercepts Claude's native plan mode and forces brainstorming workflow
⚠️ Hard gates: No implementation until design is approved by user
⚠️ Enforces TDD - may not suit rapid prototyping or exploratory coding
⚠️ Learning curve - 14 skills to understand
MIT license (permissive)
Best for: Teams wanting discipline, junior developers learning best practices
NOT for: Experienced developers with established workflows, quick prototypes
